Title: Memory Writer - Summary
Description: Embed done.summary → upsert memory_summary table with user_id scope
Definition of Done (DOD):

✓ Calls Ollama embedding API (OLLAMA_BASE_URL)
✓ Upserts into memory_summary(user_id, agent_id, embedding, text, created_at)
✓ Runs in separate goroutine (non-blocking)

✓ Error handling: logs failure but doesn't fail request
✓ Unit tests for embedding + upsert logic
✓ Integration test with real Postgres + Ollama

Title: Memory Writer - Workflow
Description: Embed done.dag_json → deduplicate → insert memory_workflow table (agent_id scoped)
Definition of Done (DOD):
✓ Receives DoneEvent.dag_json from gRPC stream
✓ Embeds via Ollama
✓ Deduplication: skip insert if cosine distance < 0.1 to existing row for agent_id
✓ Inserts into memory_workflow(agent_id, query_embedding, dag_json, created_at)
✓ Runs in separate goroutine (non-blocking)
✓ Respects memory_policy: skip if policy.workflow == 'never' or (policy.workflow == 'eval_ok_only' AND !eval_ok)
✓ Error handling: logs failure but doesn't fail request
